channel.title: AI Daily
channel.description: Daily AI, Agents & Agentic Commerce News Podcast
channel.itunes:author: Michael Lugassy

item.title: OpenAI Ads, Apple Choices, Meta Agents: May AI
item.description: This episode examines OpenAI's self-serve ChatGPT advertising platform targeting billions in revenue, Apple's Extensions allowing third-party AI model selection in iOS 27, and Meta's agentic assistant with Instagram shopping integration, alongside Anthropic's Wall Street deployment venture and SpaceX compute deal plus stablecoin agent payments.
item.itunes:summary: This episode examines OpenAI's self-serve ChatGPT advertising platform targeting billions in revenue, Apple's Extensions allowing third-party AI model selection in iOS 27, and Meta's agentic assistant with Instagram shopping integration, alongside Anthropic's Wall Street deployment venture and SpaceX compute deal plus stablecoin agent payments.
item.dc:creator: Michael Lugassy

item.title: Pentagon AI Deals, Agent Hijacks & GPT Surprises
item.description: This episode covers the Pentagon's classified AI agreements with Nvidia, Microsoft and AWS; Google's warnings on hidden web commands hijacking AI agents; Meta's humanoid robotics acquisition; Oxford research on overly friendly AI errors; and OpenAI's GPT-5.4 surpassing humans in autonomous tasks, plus related lawsuit updates.
item.itunes:summary: This episode covers the Pentagon's classified AI agreements with Nvidia, Microsoft and AWS; Google's warnings on hidden web commands hijacking AI agents; Meta's humanoid robotics acquisition; Oxford research on overly friendly AI errors; and OpenAI's GPT-5.4 surpassing humans in autonomous tasks, plus related lawsuit updates.
item.dc:creator: Michael Lugassy

item.title: US AI Tests, Agent Payments & Wall Street Agents
item.description: This episode covers US pre-release AI model testing agreements, Anthropic's financial agents launch, and AWS-enabled autonomous agent payments, plus new models and funding rounds.
item.itunes:summary: This episode covers US pre-release AI model testing agreements, Anthropic's financial agents launch, and AWS-enabled autonomous agent payments, plus new models and funding rounds.
item.dc:creator: Michael Lugassy

item.title: Anthropic $200B Deal, AI Layoffs & UAE Agentic Push
item.description: This episode covers Anthropic's record $200 billion Google Cloud commitment that briefly overtook Nvidia in market value, Coinbase and PayPal's AI-driven layoffs of thousands, and the UAE's plan to automate half its government with agentic AI, alongside Chinese model advances and new agent tools.
item.itunes:summary: This episode covers Anthropic's record $200 billion Google Cloud commitment that briefly overtook Nvidia in market value, Coinbase and PayPal's AI-driven layoffs of thousands, and the UAE's plan to automate half its government with agentic AI, alongside Chinese model advances and new agent tools.
item.dc:creator: Michael Lugassy

item.title: AI Funding Surge, Chatbot Lawsuit & Agent Tools
item.description: Covers Sierra's $950M raise for enterprise AI customer agents, Pennsylvania's lawsuit against Character.AI for doctor impersonation, PayPal's $1.5B AI-driven restructuring, plus advances in video generation, agent governance and coding pricing.
item.itunes:summary: Covers Sierra's $950M raise for enterprise AI customer agents, Pennsylvania's lawsuit against Character.AI for doctor impersonation, PayPal's $1.5B AI-driven restructuring, plus advances in video generation, agent governance and coding pricing.
item.dc:creator: Michael Lugassy

item.title: EU Dilutes AI Rules, Agent Launches & Revenue Hits
item.description: This episode covers the EU's agreement to dilute and delay AI Act rules, OpenAI's Trusted Contact rollout and Voice API launch, Google's testing of the Remy agent, Meta's agentic assistant development, Coder's enterprise agent launch, ElevenLabs reaching $500M ARR, SAP's $1.18B AI lab plans, and OpenAI-Oracle supercluster deal.
item.itunes:summary: This episode covers the EU's agreement to dilute and delay AI Act rules, OpenAI's Trusted Contact rollout and Voice API launch, Google's testing of the Remy agent, Meta's agentic assistant development, Coder's enterprise agent launch, ElevenLabs reaching $500M ARR, SAP's $1.18B AI lab plans, and OpenAI-Oracle supercluster deal.
item.dc:creator: Michael Lugassy

item.title: Agent Payments, iOS AI Picks & DeepSeek Billions
item.description: OpenAI rolls out ChatGPT self-serve ads, Amazon enables AI agent stablecoin payments with Coinbase and Stripe, Apple introduces third-party model choice on iOS 27, Anthropic lands SpaceX compute and Wall Street deployment deals, Microsoft Agent 365 reaches general availability, and DeepSeek targets $50 billion valuation.
item.itunes:summary: OpenAI rolls out ChatGPT self-serve ads, Amazon enables AI agent stablecoin payments with Coinbase and Stripe, Apple introduces third-party model choice on iOS 27, Anthropic lands SpaceX compute and Wall Street deployment deals, Microsoft Agent 365 reaches general availability, and DeepSeek targets $50 billion valuation.
item.dc:creator: Michael Lugassy

item.title: Cerebras $4.8B IPO, Anthropic Boom & AI Zero-Day
item.description: Covers Cerebras upsizing its IPO to $4.8 billion, Anthropic revealing 80x Q1 revenue growth with $44 billion ARR, OpenAI launching a $4 billion-backed deployment company, Pentagon signing AI deals excluding Anthropic, and Google detecting the first AI-developed zero-day exploit.
item.itunes:summary: Covers Cerebras upsizing its IPO to $4.8 billion, Anthropic revealing 80x Q1 revenue growth with $44 billion ARR, OpenAI launching a $4 billion-backed deployment company, Pentagon signing AI deals excluding Anthropic, and Google detecting the first AI-developed zero-day exploit.
item.dc:creator: Michael Lugassy

item.title: Korea AI Dividend, CME Futures & SAP Agents
item.description: South Korea considers AI profit dividends for citizens, CME announces compute futures for AI hedging, SAP introduces autonomous AI agents for business operations, with OpenAI cybersecurity tools, youth job polls and more.
item.itunes:summary: South Korea considers AI profit dividends for citizens, CME announces compute futures for AI hedging, SAP introduces autonomous AI agents for business operations, with OpenAI cybersecurity tools, youth job polls and more.
item.dc:creator: Michael Lugassy

item.title: Meta Incognito AI, AI Banks & Orbital Compute
item.description: Meta launched private Incognito Chat for Meta AI on WhatsApp, Augustus received approval for the first AI-native clearing bank, and new research revealed AI agents causing harm in 41% of tasks while Google and SpaceX explored orbital data centers.
item.itunes:summary: Meta launched private Incognito Chat for Meta AI on WhatsApp, Augustus received approval for the first AI-native clearing bank, and new research revealed AI agents causing harm in 41% of tasks while Google and SpaceX explored orbital data centers.
item.dc:creator: Michael Lugassy

item.title: Anthropic Gates Pact, xAI Agent & AI Infra Surge
item.description: Anthropic and the Gates Foundation committed $200 million to AI applications in health, education and economic mobility. xAI released Grok Build early beta coding agent. Exaforce closed $125 million Series B for AI cybersecurity while Emburse and Xactly launched new autonomous agents.
item.itunes:summary: Anthropic and the Gates Foundation committed $200 million to AI applications in health, education and economic mobility. xAI released Grok Build early beta coding agent. Exaforce closed $125 million Series B for AI cybersecurity while Emburse and Xactly launched new autonomous agents.
item.dc:creator: Michael Lugassy

item.title: OpenAI Enterprise Bet, Agent Limits & Malta AI First
item.description: Covers OpenAI's $4 billion enterprise deployment launch, Microsoft's AI agent unreliability warnings, Ken Griffin's AI automation of elite finance jobs, Malta's historic ChatGPT Plus rollout to citizens, and Recursive's $4.65B self-improving AI raise.
item.itunes:summary: Covers OpenAI's $4 billion enterprise deployment launch, Microsoft's AI agent unreliability warnings, Ken Griffin's AI automation of elite finance jobs, Malta's historic ChatGPT Plus rollout to citizens, and Recursive's $4.65B self-improving AI raise.
item.dc:creator: Michael Lugassy

item.title: Musk OpenAI Loss, Vatican AI Push & Agent Boom
item.description: The episode covers Elon Musk's dismissed OpenAI lawsuit, Pope Leo XIV's new AI commission, and key agentic AI developments including a major foundation expansion and a surprising security exploit.
item.itunes:summary: The episode covers Elon Musk's dismissed OpenAI lawsuit, Pope Leo XIV's new AI commission, and key agentic AI developments including a major foundation expansion and a surprising security exploit.
item.dc:creator: Michael Lugassy

item.title: Gemini Spark Agents, OpenAI Banking & AI Shifts
item.description: This episode covers Google's launch of Gemini Spark 24/7 personal AI agent and agentic Search features from I/O, OpenAI enabling ChatGPT bank account access for finance, and AI-driven job reassignments and cuts at Meta and Standard Chartered.
item.itunes:summary: This episode covers Google's launch of Gemini Spark 24/7 personal AI agent and agentic Search features from I/O, OpenAI enabling ChatGPT bank account access for finance, and AI-driven job reassignments and cuts at Meta and Standard Chartered.
item.dc:creator: Michael Lugassy

item.title: Nvidia AI Records, Meta Shakeups & Agentic Shopping Wins
item.description: This episode covers Nvidia's record Q1 earnings surge driven by AI demand, Meta's reassignment of 7,000 staff to AI roles amid layoffs, Google's Universal Cart for agentic commerce and Omni multimodal model, plus OpenAI's math breakthrough and NextEra's $67B power merger.
item.itunes:summary: This episode covers Nvidia's record Q1 earnings surge driven by AI demand, Meta's reassignment of 7,000 staff to AI roles amid layoffs, Google's Universal Cart for agentic commerce and Omni multimodal model, plus OpenAI's math breakthrough and NextEra's $67B power merger.
item.dc:creator: Michael Lugassy

item.title: SpaceX AI IPO, Google Omni & Meta AI Pivot
item.description: This episode covers SpaceX's S-1 filing with orbital AI data centers and Terafab chips, Google's Gemini Omni video model and Search agent overhaul, Meta's 8,000 layoffs plus 7,000 AI reassignments, Karpathy joining Anthropic, Trump postponing an AI executive order, and Microsoft open-sourcing agent safety tools.
item.itunes:summary: This episode covers SpaceX's S-1 filing with orbital AI data centers and Terafab chips, Google's Gemini Omni video model and Search agent overhaul, Meta's 8,000 layoffs plus 7,000 AI reassignments, Karpathy joining Anthropic, Trump postponing an AI executive order, and Microsoft open-sourcing agent safety tools.
item.dc:creator: Michael Lugassy

item.title: AI Math Breakthrough, $45B Deal & Agentic Push
item.description: Covers OpenAI autonomously disproving an 80-year math conjecture, Anthropic's $45B SpaceX compute commitment, Meta's employee data training for AI before mass layoffs, Trump's scrapped AI safety order, and Google's I/O agentic advancements.
item.itunes:summary: Covers OpenAI autonomously disproving an 80-year math conjecture, Anthropic's $45B SpaceX compute commitment, Meta's employee data training for AI before mass layoffs, Trump's scrapped AI safety order, and Google's I/O agentic advancements.
item.dc:creator: Michael Lugassy

item.title: Anthropic $900B Surge, Pope AI Encyclical & IPO Race
item.description: Anthropic closes $30B round at over $900B valuation; Pope Leo XIV releases first AI encyclical Magnifica Humanitas alongside Anthropic co-founder; OpenAI prepares confidential S-1 IPO filing. Covers major funding, policy shifts, agent capabilities, talent moves, infrastructure deals, and global AI competition.
item.itunes:summary: Anthropic closes $30B round at over $900B valuation; Pope Leo XIV releases first AI encyclical Magnifica Humanitas alongside Anthropic co-founder; OpenAI prepares confidential S-1 IPO filing. Covers major funding, policy shifts, agent capabilities, talent moves, infrastructure deals, and global AI competition.
item.dc:creator: Michael Lugassy

item.title: China AI Talent Curbs, Agentic Commerce & Price Wars
item.description: China restricts overseas travel for top AI talent at Alibaba and DeepSeek. Mastercard details its vision for trusted agentic commerce with scaled payments and security. DeepSeek makes V4 Pro price cuts permanent amid escalating AI wars, alongside US business AI adoption growth and new healthcare regulations.
item.itunes:summary: China restricts overseas travel for top AI talent at Alibaba and DeepSeek. Mastercard details its vision for trusted agentic commerce with scaled payments and security. DeepSeek makes V4 Pro price cuts permanent amid escalating AI wars, alongside US business AI adoption growth and new healthcare regulations.
item.dc:creator: Michael Lugassy

item.title: Trillion AI Chips, Desktop Agents & Creativity Benchmarks
item.description: Covers SK Hynix and Micron hitting $1 trillion market caps on AI memory demand, Microsoft shipping computer-using agents to general availability in Copilot Studio, and a 100,000-person study finding generative AI outperforming average humans on creativity tests, plus updates in cybersecurity, robotaxis, and courts.
item.itunes:summary: Covers SK Hynix and Micron hitting $1 trillion market caps on AI memory demand, Microsoft shipping computer-using agents to general availability in Copilot Studio, and a 100,000-person study finding generative AI outperforming average humans on creativity tests, plus updates in cybersecurity, robotaxis, and courts.
item.dc:creator: Michael Lugassy

item.title: Agentic Trading Debuts, Claude Big Four Wave & Valuation Surges
item.description: Robinhood enables AI agents for stock trades and purchases, KPMG deploys Claude across 276,000 staff in global alliance, and Cognition raises over $1B at $26B valuation alongside new models, inference funding talks, and infrastructure deals.
item.itunes:summary: Robinhood enables AI agents for stock trades and purchases, KPMG deploys Claude across 276,000 staff in global alliance, and Cognition raises over $1B at $26B valuation alongside new models, inference funding talks, and infrastructure deals.
item.dc:creator: Michael Lugassy

item.title: Opus 4.8, Groq Pivot & ByteDance $70B Bet
item.description: Covers Anthropic's Claude Opus 4.8 upgrade featuring dynamic workflows, Groq's $650M funding for inference shift, ByteDance's planned $70B AI capex, xAI Grok Build beta, Figure AI robotics milestone, Sam Altman jobs reversal, AI film at Tribeca, Microsoft-Mistral agent tools, Celonis enterprise context launch, Samsung AI bonuses dispute, and South Korea senior robot companions.
item.itunes:summary: Covers Anthropic's Claude Opus 4.8 upgrade featuring dynamic workflows, Groq's $650M funding for inference shift, ByteDance's planned $70B AI capex, xAI Grok Build beta, Figure AI robotics milestone, Sam Altman jobs reversal, AI film at Tribeca, Microsoft-Mistral agent tools, Celonis enterprise context launch, Samsung AI bonuses dispute, and South Korea senior robot companions.
item.dc:creator: Michael Lugassy

item.title: SoftBank's €75B France Bet & NVIDIA Desktop AI
item.description: Covers SoftBank's record French AI data center investment, NVIDIA's Windows-based trillion-parameter systems and RTX Spark, Sysdig's first autonomous LLM agent cyberattack, Canada's leaked national AI strategy, Mistral Vibe agent launch, Verizon's scaled agentic fleet system, humanoid robots in Ukraine, GitHub Copilot billing shift, and AI deepfake enforcement challenges.
item.itunes:summary: Covers SoftBank's record French AI data center investment, NVIDIA's Windows-based trillion-parameter systems and RTX Spark, Sysdig's first autonomous LLM agent cyberattack, Canada's leaked national AI strategy, Mistral Vibe agent launch, Verizon's scaled agentic fleet system, humanoid robots in Ukraine, GitHub Copilot billing shift, and AI deepfake enforcement challenges.
item.dc:creator: Michael Lugassy

item.title: Trump AI Order, Microsoft Scout & Nvidia RTX Spark
item.description: Covers Trump's voluntary 30-day frontier AI model review executive order, Microsoft's Scout always-on agent and seven new MAI models at Build 2026, Nvidia's RTX Spark AI PC chips and physical AI advances at Computex.
item.itunes:summary: Covers Trump's voluntary 30-day frontier AI model review executive order, Microsoft's Scout always-on agent and seven new MAI models at Build 2026, Nvidia's RTX Spark AI PC chips and physical AI advances at Computex.
item.dc:creator: Michael Lugassy

item.title: MAI Models, Stargate Build & Agent Pricing Push
item.description: Microsoft's MAI-Thinking-1 in-house reasoning model and Build announcements; OpenAI's Stargate Michigan data center groundbreaking; GitHub Copilot billing upheaval; Anthropic's IPO filing, Mythos expansions and Glasswing growth; Meta's planned high-priced Hatch agent; ChatGPT user milestone; Google Gemini Spark rollout; and major AI infrastructure funding.
item.itunes:summary: Microsoft's MAI-Thinking-1 in-house reasoning model and Build announcements; OpenAI's Stargate Michigan data center groundbreaking; GitHub Copilot billing upheaval; Anthropic's IPO filing, Mythos expansions and Glasswing growth; Meta's planned high-priced Hatch agent; ChatGPT user milestone; Google Gemini Spark rollout; and major AI infrastructure funding.
item.dc:creator: Michael Lugassy

item.title: Canada AI Strategy, SpaceX xAI IPO & Meta Agents
item.description: Canada unveils 'AI for All' national plan with 250k jobs and student agents; SpaceX opens $1.75T IPO roadshow including xAI; Meta launches global Business Agent for enterprises alongside IBM-Google Cloud AI partnership and Norton Family Assistant debut.
item.itunes:summary: Canada unveils 'AI for All' national plan with 250k jobs and student agents; SpaceX opens $1.75T IPO roadshow including xAI; Meta launches global Business Agent for enterprises alongside IBM-Google Cloud AI partnership and Norton Family Assistant debut.
item.dc:creator: Michael Lugassy

item.title: AI Agents Surge, DeepSeek $7.4B Round & Trump Profit Talks
item.description: Covers Trump's planned White House meetings on government AI profit shares, Anthropic's call for frontier AI development pauses over self-improvement risks, DeepSeek nearing its first $7.4B external round at up to $59B valuation, Generalist AI's $400M physical AGI funding, OpenAI's Opal investment, and AI agents driving transformation and spending.
item.itunes:summary: Covers Trump's planned White House meetings on government AI profit shares, Anthropic's call for frontier AI development pauses over self-improvement risks, DeepSeek nearing its first $7.4B external round at up to $59B valuation, Generalist AI's $400M physical AGI funding, OpenAI's Opal investment, and AI agents driving transformation and spending.
item.dc:creator: Michael Lugassy

item.title: Gemini Siri Debut, Pentagon AI Pivot & Nvidia Memory Deal
item.description: Apple's WWDC reveals Gemini-powered Siri overhaul, multi-model Apple Intelligence, and Tim Cook's final keynote; Pentagon evaluates OpenAI and Google models to replace Anthropic in classified systems; Nvidia-SK Hynix multi-year AI memory partnership and Microsoft Foundry catalog expansion.
item.itunes:summary: Apple's WWDC reveals Gemini-powered Siri overhaul, multi-model Apple Intelligence, and Tim Cook's final keynote; Pentagon evaluates OpenAI and Google models to replace Anthropic in classified systems; Nvidia-SK Hynix multi-year AI memory partnership and Microsoft Foundry catalog expansion.
item.dc:creator: Michael Lugassy

item.title: OpenAI IPO Filing, China AI Billions & Orbital Compute Surge
item.description: OpenAI confidentially files for IPO amid AI public market rush; China readies $295B five-year data center buildout; SpaceX targets late-2027 orbital AI tests. Plus Google-SpaceX compute deal, Anthropic Mythos launch, Meta AI hack, and regulatory ripples.
item.itunes:summary: OpenAI confidentially files for IPO amid AI public market rush; China readies $295B five-year data center buildout; SpaceX targets late-2027 orbital AI tests. Plus Google-SpaceX compute deal, Anthropic Mythos launch, Meta AI hack, and regulatory ripples.
item.dc:creator: Michael Lugassy

item.title: Claude Fable 5, Agent Payments Launch & Neura $1.4B Round
item.description: Anthropic releases its first public Mythos-class model Claude Fable 5 with built-in safeguards; Mastercard and Visa advance infrastructure for AI agent payments and commerce; Neura Robotics secures a record $1.4 billion Series C for cognitive robots and physical AI.
item.itunes:summary: Anthropic releases its first public Mythos-class model Claude Fable 5 with built-in safeguards; Mastercard and Visa advance infrastructure for AI agent payments and commerce; Neura Robotics secures a record $1.4 billion Series C for cognitive robots and physical AI.
item.dc:creator: Michael Lugassy

item.title: OpenAI Commerce Protocol, Anthropic IPO Filing & Senate AI Hearings
item.description: OpenAI launches Agentic Commerce Protocol with Instant Checkout and Oracle Cloud access plus Ona acquisition; Anthropic files S-1 near $965B valuation; Senate Banking Committee AI hearing; China AI home robots; Supabase, Suno, Generalist AI and Flourish funding rounds; Super Micro $7B AI raise.
item.itunes:summary: OpenAI launches Agentic Commerce Protocol with Instant Checkout and Oracle Cloud access plus Ona acquisition; Anthropic files S-1 near $965B valuation; Senate Banking Committee AI hearing; China AI home robots; Supabase, Suno, Generalist AI and Flourish funding rounds; Super Micro $7B AI raise.
item.dc:creator: Michael Lugassy

item.title: SpaceX Record IPO, Bezos $12B AI Bet & Model Crackdowns
item.description: SpaceX debuts as largest IPO ever with xAI bundled in; Prometheus raises $12B at $41B for physical systems AI; KKR-NVIDIA launch $10B infrastructure platform; Google sues over Gemini-powered scams; Mistral funding talks; EngineAI HK IPO filing; Anthropic disables top models on US order; Florida probes OpenAI; OpenAI free Codex tier; Zhipu GLM 5.2 rollout; G7 AI sovereignty talks; Teradyne physical AI deployments.
item.itunes:summary: SpaceX debuts as largest IPO ever with xAI bundled in; Prometheus raises $12B at $41B for physical systems AI; KKR-NVIDIA launch $10B infrastructure platform; Google sues over Gemini-powered scams; Mistral funding talks; EngineAI HK IPO filing; Anthropic disables top models on US order; Florida probes OpenAI; OpenAI free Codex tier; Zhipu GLM 5.2 rollout; G7 AI sovereignty talks; Teradyne physical AI deployments.
item.dc:creator: Michael Lugassy

item.title: US AI Export Ban Hits Anthropic & Agent M&A Surge
item.description: US orders Anthropic to block foreign access to top models over security concerns; Salesforce acquires Fin AI agent platform for $3.6B; NewCore raises $66M for AI agent identity management; Anthropic policy proposals and Fable 5 prompt leak also covered.
item.itunes:summary: US orders Anthropic to block foreign access to top models over security concerns; Salesforce acquires Fin AI agent platform for $3.6B; NewCore raises $66M for AI agent identity management; Anthropic policy proposals and Fable 5 prompt leak also covered.
item.dc:creator: Michael Lugassy

item.title: SpaceX $60B Cursor Buy, Anthropic Model Halt & Agentic Commerce Push
item.description: Covers SpaceX's massive Cursor acquisition, Anthropic's compliance with a US security directive disabling advanced models, Databricks' Genie One agent launch, HPE-NVIDIA enterprise agentic AI advances, Adyen and LTX agentic commerce tools, open commerce protocols, and Visa's consumer trust findings.
item.itunes:summary: Covers SpaceX's massive Cursor acquisition, Anthropic's compliance with a US security directive disabling advanced models, Databricks' Genie One agent launch, HPE-NVIDIA enterprise agentic AI advances, Adyen and LTX agentic commerce tools, open commerce protocols, and Visa's consumer trust findings.
item.dc:creator: Michael Lugassy

item.title: G7 AI Revolt, xAI Shield & Visa Agent Deals
item.description: G7 leaders challenge US AI export controls with trusted partners plan; US warns Anthropic on foreign model access; Visa-OpenAI agent payments launch amid $15T B2B projections. Also covers xAI lawsuit intervention, OpenAI losses, GitHub AI overload, market shifts and more.
item.itunes:summary: G7 leaders challenge US AI export controls with trusted partners plan; US warns Anthropic on foreign model access; Visa-OpenAI agent payments launch amid $15T B2B projections. Also covers xAI lawsuit intervention, OpenAI losses, GitHub AI overload, market shifts and more.
item.dc:creator: Michael Lugassy

item.title: Snap AR Specs, Orbital Gemma & Agentjacking Crisis
item.description: Covers Snap's $2,195 SPECS AR glasses launch with AI coding integrations, the Agentjacking attack on agents like Claude Code and Cursor, Google's Gemma 3 as first AI model in orbit, xAI's Grok for Word add-in, OpenAI's drug discovery research, and Databricks Genie Agents announcements.
item.itunes:summary: Covers Snap's $2,195 SPECS AR glasses launch with AI coding integrations, the Agentjacking attack on agents like Claude Code and Cursor, Google's Gemma 3 as first AI model in orbit, xAI's Grok for Word add-in, OpenAI's drug discovery research, and Databricks Genie Agents announcements.
item.dc:creator: Michael Lugassy

item.title: FERC Grid Orders, ChatGPT Share Drop & Altman Movie Shock
item.description: Covers FERC's orders accelerating AI data center grid connections, ChatGPT falling below 50% market share, Amazon dropping its Sam Altman biopic after OpenAI deal, GPT-5.6 leaks and launch signals, AWS Bedrock AgentCore harness GA, Gemini 3.5 Pro nearing release, Shopify UCP self-serve update, Coinbase for Agents trading capabilities, and related agent infrastructure and model advances from June 19-21.
item.itunes:summary: Covers FERC's orders accelerating AI data center grid connections, ChatGPT falling below 50% market share, Amazon dropping its Sam Altman biopic after OpenAI deal, GPT-5.6 leaks and launch signals, AWS Bedrock AgentCore harness GA, Gemini 3.5 Pro nearing release, Shopify UCP self-serve update, Coinbase for Agents trading capabilities, and related agent infrastructure and model advances from June 19-21.
item.dc:creator: Michael Lugassy

item.title: Oracle AI Layoffs, SpaceX Bonds & Agentic Finance Surge
item.description: Covers Oracle disclosing 21,000 AI-cited job cuts, SpaceX launching its first major bond sale for AI ambitions, Kanverse's new agentic finance platform, Micron's strategic deal with Anthropic on infrastructure and investment, plus YCharts and Zocks agent launches and payments-government AI shifts.
item.itunes:summary: Covers Oracle disclosing 21,000 AI-cited job cuts, SpaceX launching its first major bond sale for AI ambitions, Kanverse's new agentic finance platform, Micron's strategic deal with Anthropic on infrastructure and investment, plus YCharts and Zocks agent launches and payments-government AI shifts.
item.dc:creator: Michael Lugassy

item.title: AI Funding Frenzy, Meta Glasses & Cyber Warnings
item.description: Covers Menlo Ventures' record $3B AI raise and Baseten's $1.5B round at $13B valuation, Five Eyes agencies warning of AI cyberattacks in months, Meta's new $299 AI smart glasses, tech stock selloff amid AI spending fears, and Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 shifting to usage credits.
item.itunes:summary: Covers Menlo Ventures' record $3B AI raise and Baseten's $1.5B round at $13B valuation, Five Eyes agencies warning of AI cyberattacks in months, Meta's new $299 AI smart glasses, tech stock selloff amid AI spending fears, and Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 shifting to usage credits.
item.dc:creator: Michael Lugassy

item.title: AI Chip Billions, Getty OpenAI Shock & Nadella Warning
item.description: Covers SK Hynix's $29B Nasdaq push for AI chips, Samsung's 125k-employee ChatGPT rollout, Getty Images' massive OpenAI image deal, Nadella's critique of frontier labs, OpenAI's Jalapeño chip with Broadcom, and Bear Robotics' Kinisi acquisition.
item.itunes:summary: Covers SK Hynix's $29B Nasdaq push for AI chips, Samsung's 125k-employee ChatGPT rollout, Getty Images' massive OpenAI image deal, Nadella's critique of frontier labs, OpenAI's Jalapeño chip with Broadcom, and Bear Robotics' Kinisi acquisition.
item.dc:creator: Michael Lugassy
